key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating cash flow $5452.0M less capital spending $1248.0M ÷ 484.0M diluted shares per ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm
Mid-cycle normalization; Ag Services crush recovery; Nutrition mix shift continues

open_questions: Confirm whether FY2025 OCF **$5.45B** is sustainable mid-cycle anchor or working-capital-heavy recovery.
Proxy: review executive compensation alignment post-investigation (DEF 14A 2026).
No approved third-party sources; stance rests on filings only.
thesis: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) is one of the world's largest agricultural processors, turning crops into food, feed, fuel, and industrial ingredients. **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue was **$80.3 billion**, down from **$85.5 billion** in FY2024 and **$93.9 billion** at the FY2023 cycle peak. **[Fact]** The company operates through three reportable segments: **Ag Services & Oilseeds** (origination, crushing, refining), **Carbohydrate Solutions** (corn wet milling, starches, sweeteners), and **Nutrition** (human and animal ingredients). **[Fact]** FY2025 operating cash flow was **$5.45 billion** minus capital spending **$1.25 billion**, while reported net income fell to **$1.08 billion** (diluted EPS **$2.23**) on compressed crush margins. **[Inference]** ADM earns by arbitraging global crop flows, operating toll-like processing assets, and upselling specialty nutrition products on top of commodity throughput.
why_market_wrong: The stock may embed permanent earnings impairment after the accounting investigation and margin trough, while operating cash flow has already recovered. **[Fact]** FY2025 operating cash flow **$5.45 billion** rebounded from **$2.79 billion** in FY2024 even as net income stayed depressed. **[Fact]** On January 27, 2026, ADM settled with the SEC for a **$40 million** civil penalty and the DOJ closed its inquiry, resolving intersegment-sales investigations. **[Inference]** The market may overweight governance overhang and underweight mid-cycle crush-margin normalization and the Nutrition mix shift. **[Inference]** No approved third-party predictive attribute exists; the edge is **scale franchise at a cyclical trough** with **partial** downside protection from asset intensity, not a dated catalyst.
